plan.prime-directive: PLATFORM PAPER — NOT SOTA RACE. MambaVesselNet is ONE of FOUR families demonstrating ModelAdapter ABC generalizability. BANNED: "MambaVesselNet outperforms / surpasses / beats DynUNet" CORRECT: "MambaVesselNet demonstrates the SSM family integrates via ModelAdapter ABC" Source: .claude/metalearning/2026-03-15-sota-framing-violation-platform-not-race.md
plan.architecture-summary:
MambaVesselNet++ (model class: mvnNet, file: model_mvn/mvn.py, MIT license)
ENCODER (Hi-Encoder) — MONAI UnetrBasicBlock + stride-2 Conv3d: enc_conv1: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 1, 48, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") down1: nn.Conv3d(48, 48, kernel_size=2, stride=2) enc_conv2: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 48, 96, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") down2: nn.Conv3d(96, 96, kernel_size=2, stride=2) enc_conv3: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 96, 192, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") down3: nn.Conv3d(192, 192, kernel_size=2, stride=2) enc_conv4: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 192, 384, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") down4: nn.Conv3d(384, 384, kernel_size=2, stride=2) enc_conv5: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 384, 768, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") Total downsampling: 4 levels → divisor = 2^4 = 16
BOTTLENECK — 8 MambaBlocks at 768 channels (4 enc + 4 dec): Each MambaBlock (depth=1): x = x + BidirectionalMambaLayer(x) [LN INSIDE BidirMamba, NOT here] x = x + MlpChannel(LN(x)) [LN only for MLP branch] BidirectionalMambaLayer: flatten (B,C,H,W,D)→(B,H*W*D,C), LN, fwd Mamba + reverse Mamba, sum, unflatten back to (B,C,H,W,D), residual. MlpChannel: Conv3d(768, 3072, 1) → GELU → Conv3d(3072, 768, 1)
DECODER — MONAI UnetrUpBlock + skip connections: dec_conv5: UnetrUpBlock(3, 768, 384, kernel=3, upsample_kernel=2, norm="instance") forward(bottleneck_out, enc4) # skip=enc4 (384ch) ✓ dec_conv4: UnetrUpBlock(3, 384, 192, ...) forward(x, enc3) # skip=enc3 (192ch) ✓ dec_conv3: UnetrUpBlock(3, 192, 96, ...) forward(x, enc2) # skip=enc2 (96ch) ✓ dec_conv2: UnetrUpBlock(3, 96, 48, ...) forward(x, enc1) # skip=enc1 (48ch) ✓ dec_conv1: UnetrBasicBlock(3, 48, 48, kernel=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance") out: UnetOutBlock(3, 48, out_chans) → raw logits, no softmax
NOTE on UnetrUpBlock skip channels: MONAI's UnetrUpBlock.conv_block is initialized with in_channels = out_channels + out_channels (cat of upsampled + skip). This requires skip.channels == out_channels. The above routing satisfies this.
OUTPUT: (B, out_chans, H, W, D) raw logits — softmax applied by _build_output(). DIMENSION ORDER: (B, C, H, W, D) throughout — MONAI convention, depth LAST. No permutation at adapter boundary (3D conv + Mamba scan are spatially symmetric).
PAPER MEASUREMENTS (Chen et al., A5000 GPU): Training VRAM: 6.9 GB at batch=2, patch=64³ Our hardware: MUST MEASURE on RTX 2070 Super (8GB) + RTX 4090 (24GB) in T09.

decisions.decision: INLINE: Copy only necessary classes (MlpChannel, BidirectionalMambaLayer, MambaBlock, MambaVesselNetBackbone) into mambavesselnet.py. MIT license permits. Re-read CC0117/MambaVesselNet/model_mvn/mvn.py before T05 to verify exact args.

PyPI mamba-ssm==2.3.1 (latest stable; source-only, requires CUDA compilation). Add to pyproject.toml optional group [mamba-ssm] (NOT [mamba] — see [TDD-W6]). BidirectionalMambaLayer = two standard Mamba modules: fwd(x) + bwd(x.flip(1)).flip(1). This is equivalent to bimamba_type="v2" without the vendored fork. NOTE: mamba-ssm ships source-only — Docker build strategy required (T00).

NO PERMUTATION. Adapter receives (B,C,H,W,D) [MONAI convention, depth LAST], passes directly to backbone, returns (B,C,H,W,D). 3D convolutions are spatially symmetric; Mamba scan flattens H*W*D regardless. NOTE: Docstrings must use (B,C,H,W,D) notation consistently — not (B,C,D,H,W).

CONSERVATIVE: AMP ON for training, AMP OFF for validation (mixed_precision_val=False). Mirrors SAM3 policy — Mamba CUDA kernels have unknown BF16/FP16 behavior under 3D sliding_window_inference. Relax only after T06 AMP tests confirm no NaN.
Override get_eval_roi_size() → (64, 64, 64). Matches training patch size.
REUSE: UnetrBasicBlock, UnetrUpBlock, UnetOutBlock from MONAI directly. ALL constructor calls MUST include norm_name="instance" — it has no default.

LayerNorm lives INSIDE BidirectionalMambaLayer only (applied to flattened sequence). MambaBlock does NOT add LayerNorm before calling BidirMamba. MambaBlock DOES add LayerNorm before calling MlpChannel. This prevents double-LN (BidirMamba-internal LN + MambaBlock pre-norm).

Lives in src/minivess/adapters/model_builder.py (consistent with _sam3_package_available). Re-exported from src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py for test imports. Test files import: from minivess.adapters.mambavesselnet import _mamba_available

CPU tests (no mamba-ssm): tests/v2/unit/test_mambavesselnet_*.py GPU tests (require mamba-ssm + CUDA): tests/gpu_instance/test_mambavesselnet_gpu.py This mirrors SAM3 pattern and avoids breaking the Test Collection Gate pre-commit hook.
mamba-ssm selective scan CUDA kernels are not ONNX-traceable. MambaVesselNetAdapter.export_onnx() raises NotImplementedError with clear message. Document in model profile YAML: onnx_supported: false.

task.title: Docker base image: mamba-ssm CUDA compilation strategy
task.description:
mamba-ssm==2.3.1 ships source-only (no wheels). Requires nvcc + CUDA headers. Dockerfile.base multi-stage build: builder=devel (has nvcc), runner=runtime (no nvcc). Strategy: compile mamba-ssm in builder stage, copy compiled site-packages to runner.
Changes required in deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base builder stage: # After torch install, compile mamba-ssm: RUN uv sync --extra mamba-ssm || true # compile in builder; wheels land in .venv
The builder-stage .venv is already copied to runner via COPY --from=builder. Verify the CUDA-compiled .so files survive the COPY.
Also required: - Add mamba_ssm and causal_conv1d to [tool.mypy.overrides] ignore_missing_imports - Rebuild and re-push Docker image before T09/T10 cloud runs
NOTE: DO NOT enable mamba-ssm compilation by default in the base image. Gate it behind a build-arg: ARG INSTALL_MAMBA=0 / RUN if [ "$INSTALL_MAMBA" = "1" ]... This keeps default build time fast for labs without GPU/Mamba needs.
task.tdd-spec: No new tests (Docker build correctness is integration-tested via smoke test). Acceptance test: docker run --rm minivess-base:mamba python -c "import mamba_ssm; print(mamba_ssm.__version__)" succeeds.
task.files-to-modify: deployment/docker/Dockerfile.base pyproject.toml (mypy overrides for mamba_ssm.*, causal_conv1d.*)
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] docker build --build-arg INSTALL_MAMBA=1 succeeds - [ ] mamba_ssm importable in runner container - [ ] Default build (INSTALL_MAMBA=0) unchanged — no extra build time - [ ] mypy overrides: mamba_ssm.* and causal_conv1d.* ignore_missing_imports=true

task.title: ModelFamily enum + [mamba-ssm] optional group + availability gate
task.description: 1. Add MAMBAVESSELNET = "mambavesselnet" to ModelFamily enum (config/models.py) 2. Add [mamba-ssm] optional group to pyproject.toml: mamba-ssm==2.3.1 (exact pin — source-only, version-coupled with causal-conv1d) causal-conv1d>=1.4.0,less than 2.0.0 3. Add _mamba_available() to model_builder.py (mirrors _sam3_package_available()) 4. Re-export _mamba_available from mambavesselnet.py for test imports (D08) 5. Add mamba_ssm.* + causal_conv1d.* to [tool.mypy.overrides] ignore_missing_imports 6. CHECK: capability-schema-check pre-commit hook fires on config/models.py changes. Read minivess/testing/capability_discovery.py — update any hardcoded family lists.
task.tdd-spec:
NEW FILE: tests/v2/unit/test_mambavesselnet_availability.py
class TestModelFamilyEnum: test_mambavesselnet_in_enum: ModelFamily.MAMBAVESSELNET exists test_mambavesselnet_value: ModelFamily.MAMBAVESSELNET == "mambavesselnet" test_no_duplicate_values: all ModelFamily values are unique
class TestMambaAvailability: test_returns_bool: _mamba_available() returns bool, no exception test_graceful_on_missing: monkeypatch sys.modules["mamba_ssm"] = None _mamba_available() returns False, no exception test_import_path: from minivess.adapters.mambavesselnet import _mamba_available
class TestModelConfigWithMamba: test_parses: ModelConfig(family=ModelFamily.MAMBAVESSELNET, name="t", in_channels=1, out_channels=2) — no exception
task.files-to-modify: src/minivess/config/models.py src/minivess/adapters/model_builder.py src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py (create with _mamba_available re-export) pyproject.toml (group + mypy overrides)
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] ModelFamily.MAMBAVESSELNET = "mambavesselnet" - [ ] pyproject.toml [mamba-ssm] group present - [ ] mypy overrides: mamba_ssm.* + causal_conv1d.* ignore_missing_imports=true - [ ] capability-schema-check passes after models.py change - [ ] All 7 unit tests pass (staging tier, CPU only) - [ ] uv run mypy src/ passes (no mamba_ssm import errors)

task.title: MlpChannel (channel MLP, CPU, no mamba dependency)
task.description: Implement MlpChannel in src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py. Architecture: Conv3d(dim, dim*4, 1) → GELU → Conv3d(dim*4, dim, 1) Pure PyTorch — no mamba-ssm needed. Runs on CPU.
task.tdd-spec:
NEW FILE: tests/v2/unit/test_mambavesselnet_blocks.py
class TestMlpChannel: test_output_shape_small: (2,48,4,4,4) → (2,48,4,4,4) test_output_shape_bottleneck: (1,768,2,2,2) → (1,768,2,2,2) test_inner_expansion_4x: mlp.fc1.out_channels == 4 * dim test_spatial_dims_unchanged: out.shape[2:] == inp.shape[2:] test_nonlinear: output.sum() != 0.0 and output != input (some transformation)

task.title: BidirectionalMambaLayer (CPU shape + GPU real)
task.description:
Implement BidirectionalMambaLayer.
ARCHITECTURE (D07 — LN INSIDE this class only): class BidirectionalMambaLayer(nn.Module): self.norm = nn.LayerNorm(dim) self.fwd = Mamba(d_model=dim, d_state=d_state, d_conv=d_conv, expand=expand) self.bwd = Mamba(d_model=dim, d_state=d_state, d_conv=d_conv, expand=expand)
def forward(self, x: Tensor) -> Tensor: # x: (B,C,H,W,D) — MONAI convention B, C, *spatial = x.shape L = math.prod(spatial) x_seq = x.reshape(B, C, L).permute(0, 2, 1) # (B, L, C) x_n = self.norm(x_seq) # (B, L, C) fwd = self.fwd(x_n) # (B, L, C) bwd = self.bwd(x_n.flip(1)).flip(1) # (B, L, C) out = (fwd + bwd).permute(0, 2, 1) # (B, C, L) out = out.reshape(B, C, *spatial) # (B, C, H, W, D) return x + out # residual
CPU MOCK STRATEGY (D09): tests/v2/unit/conftest.py adds MockMamba fixture: class MockMamba(nn.Module): def __init__(self, d_model, d_state, d_conv, expand): self.proj = nn.Linear(d_model, d_model) def forward(self, x): return self.proj(x) # (B,L,C)→(B,L,C) CPU tests inject MockMamba via constructor arg or monkeypatch.
task.tdd-spec:
ADD TO: tests/v2/unit/test_mambavesselnet_blocks.py
class TestBidirMambaLayerShape: [CPU — MockMamba injected] test_output_shape_standard: (2,768,4,4,4) → same shape test_output_shape_asymmetric: (1,768,3,5,7) → same shape [tests non-cube] test_residual_applied: output != input (transformation applied) test_has_fwd_bwd_submodules: hasattr(layer, "fwd") and hasattr(layer, "bwd")
GPU tests → tests/gpu_instance/test_mambavesselnet_gpu.py: @pytest.mark.model_loading @pytest.mark.skipif(not _mamba_available(), reason="mamba-ssm not installed") class TestBidirMambaLayerGPU: test_real_forward_shape: (1,768,4,4,4) on CUDA → same shape test_bidirectional_differs_unidirectional: bidi != single Mamba test_gradient_flows: loss.backward(), no NaN grads test_bfloat16_no_nan: autocast(bfloat16): output.isnan().any() == False
task.files-to-modify: src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py [add BidirectionalMambaLayer] tests/v2/unit/test_mambavesselnet_blocks.py tests/v2/unit/conftest.py or tests/gpu_instance/conftest.py [MockMamba fixture] tests/gpu_instance/test_mambavesselnet_gpu.py [CREATE — GPU tests]

task.title: MambaBlock (pre-norm + BidirMamba + MlpChannel)
MambaVesselNetBackbone (full mvnNet equivalent)
task.description:
Implement MambaVesselNetBackbone. All MONAI block calls MUST include norm_name. BEFORE IMPLEMENTING: re-read CC0117/MambaVesselNet/model_mvn/mvn.py for exact args.
Constructor (all norms="instance", all res_block=True): enc_conv1: UnetrBasicBlock(3, in_chans, f[0], kernel_size=3, stride=1, norm_name="instance", res_block=True) down1: nn.Conv3d(f[0], f[0], kernel_size=2, stride=2) enc_conv2: UnetrBasicBlock(3, f[0], f[1], ..., norm_name="instance") down2: nn.Conv3d(f[1], f[1], 2, 2) ... (enc_conv3/down3, enc_conv4/down4 follow same pattern) enc_conv5: UnetrBasicBlock(3, f[3], f[4], ..., norm_name="instance") enc_mamba[1-4]: nn.ModuleList([MambaBlock(f[4], depth=1) for _ in range(4)]) dec_mamba[1-4]: nn.ModuleList([MambaBlock(f[4], depth=1) for _ in range(4)]) dec_conv5: UnetrUpBlock(3, f[4], f[3], kernel_size=3, upsample_kernel_size=2, norm_name="instance", res_block=True) dec_conv4: UnetrUpBlock(3, f[3], f[2], ..., norm_name="instance") dec_conv3: UnetrUpBlock(3, f[2], f[1], ..., norm_name="instance") dec_conv2: UnetrUpBlock(3, f[1], f[0], ..., norm_name="instance") dec_conv1: UnetrBasicBlock(3, f[0], f[0], ..., norm_name="instance") out: UnetOutBlock(3, f[0], out_chans)
where f = feature_dims = [48, 96, 192, 384, 768]
forward(x): # x: (B,C,H,W,D) — MONAI convention, depth LAST enc1 = self.enc_conv1(x); x = self.down1(enc1) enc2 = self.enc_conv2(x); x = self.down2(enc2) enc3 = self.enc_conv3(x); x = self.down3(enc3) enc4 = self.enc_conv4(x); x = self.down4(enc4) z = self.enc_conv5(x) for m in self.enc_mamba: z = m(z) for m in self.dec_mamba: z = m(z) x = self.dec_conv5(z, enc4) x = self.dec_conv4(x, enc3) x = self.dec_conv3(x, enc2) x = self.dec_conv2(x, enc1) x = self.dec_conv1(x) return self.out(x) # (B, out_chans, H, W, D) raw logits
NOTE: UnetrUpBlock.forward(inp, skip) requires skip.channels == out_channels. Verify enc* output channels match dec* out_channels at each level (see routing above).
task.risk: MEDIUM: UnetrUpBlock skip-channel mismatch is a common bug. If test_shape_32 fails with shape error, print enc* shapes in forward() to diagnose. Compare with reference mvn.py channel routing.

task.title: MambaVesselNetAdapter + model_builder registration
task.files-to-modify: src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py [add MambaVesselNetAdapter] src/minivess/adapters/model_builder.py [_build_mambavesselnet + registry] tests/gpu_instance/test_mambavesselnet_gpu.py [add GPU adapter tests]
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] All CPU registry tests pass (staging tier) - [ ] All GPU adapter tests pass on RTX 4090 - [ ] sliding_window_inference tests pass - [ ] AMP tests pass — no NaN in BF16 or AMP-OFF - [ ] export_onnx raises NotImplementedError with clear message - [ ] Lazy import: importing model_builder does NOT import mamba-ssm - [ ] build_adapter(MAMBAVESSELNET config) returns correct adapter

task.title: Model profile YAML + experiment configs
task.description:
Create configs/model_profiles/mambavesselnet.yaml Required fields (ALL must be present — see ModelProfile dataclass): name, divisor, model_overhead_mb, bytes_per_voxel_amp, bytes_per_voxel_fp32, max_batch_size, default_patch_xy, vram, amp_validation divisor: 16 [CORRECT: 4 downsampling levels, 2^4=16 — NOT 32] vram.measured: false (populate after T09) amp_validation: false (conservative; update after T06 AMP tests) onnx_supported: false (Mamba selective scan not ONNX-traceable)
Create configs/experiment/debug_mambavesselnet.yaml model.family: mambavesselnet max_epochs: 2, batch_size: 1, patch_size: [64,64,64] loss: cbdice_cldice mixed_precision_val: false (AMP policy) val_interval: 3 [WARN-3: conservative for 8GB — verify does not OOM]
Create configs/experiment/smoke_mambavesselnet.yaml Same as debug but max_epochs: 10, intended for SkyPilot smoke test
Create configs/experiment/smoke_mambavesselnet_cloud.yaml Cloud-specific overrides (batch_size: 2, mixed_precision: true, etc.) Follow pattern from configs/experiment/smoke_sam3_hybrid_cloud.yaml
task.tdd-spec:
ADD TO: tests/v2/unit/test_model_profiles.py
class TestMambaVesselNetProfile: test_profile_file_exists: Path("configs/model_profiles/mambavesselnet.yaml").exists() test_load_model_profile_succeeds: from minivess.config.model_profiles import load_model_profile p = load_model_profile("mambavesselnet") assert isinstance(p, ModelProfile) [validates ALL required fields — WARN-4 fix] test_divisor_is_16: p.divisor == 16 test_vram_measured_false: p.vram.measured == False test_amp_val_false: raw = yaml.safe_load(Path(...).read_text(encoding='utf-8')) assert raw.get("amp_validation") is False [ERROR-4 fix] test_onnx_supported_false: raw = yaml.safe_load(...) assert raw.get("onnx_supported") is False
class TestDebugMambaConfig: test_debug_config_exists test_debug_config_parses: yaml.safe_load(Path(...).read_text(encoding='utf-8')) test_model_family: cfg["model"]["family"] == "mambavesselnet" test_amp_val_off: cfg.get("mixed_precision_val") is False test_val_interval_set: "val_interval" in cfg [WARN-3 fix]
task.dependency: T01 (ModelFamily enum must exist for config validation)
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] load_model_profile("mambavesselnet") succeeds (validates all required fields) - [ ] All 9 profile/config tests pass (staging tier) - [ ] vram.measured=false documented — NEVER guess VRAM - [ ] val_interval set in debug config to prevent 8GB OOM

task.title: KG update: adapters.yaml + bibliography.yaml
task.description:
Update knowledge-graph/code-structure/adapters.yaml: mambavesselnet entry: status → experimental (from planned) file: src/minivess/adapters/mambavesselnet.py (now exists after T06) Add critical_constraints from architecture summary ALSO FIX (WARN-10): The mamba_variants_archived entry says "file: src/minivess/adapters/mamba.py # NEVER CREATED — permanently retired" but mamba.py DOES exist (UlikeMamba adapter). Fix the comment to: "# NOTE: mamba.py exists but implements UlikeMamba (different model). # This archived entry refers to SegMamba/U-Mamba — never implemented here."
Add to knowledge-graph/bibliography.yaml: xu_2025_mambavesselnet_plus: title: MambaVesselNet++: A Hybrid CNN-Mamba Architecture for Medical Image Segmentation doi: https://doi.org/10.1145/3757324 venue: ACM TOMM 2025 note: Extended journal version of chen_2024_mambavesselnet (ACM MM 2024) NOTE: chen_2024_mambavesselnet already present — verify, don't duplicate.
Run: uv run python scripts/review_knowledge_links.py --quick Expected: 0 ERRORs.
task.tdd-spec: Pre-commit knowledge-links hook is the test (fires on commit). RED phase: Add mambavesselnet entry pointing to file BEFORE T06 creates it → hook should FAIL (file not found). This gates T08 commit on T06 completion. GREEN phase: After T06, file exists → hook passes.
task.files-to-modify: knowledge-graph/code-structure/adapters.yaml knowledge-graph/bibliography.yaml .gitleaksignore (if new citation keys trigger false positives)
task.dependency: T06 (adapter file must exist before committing this YAML)
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] mambavesselnet entry: status=experimental, file path resolves - [ ] mamba_variants_archived comment corrected - [ ] xu_2025_mambavesselnet_plus added to bibliography - [ ] knowledge-links hook passes on commit

task.title: VRAM measurement on RTX 2070 Super + RTX 4090
task.description:
Measure peak VRAM at training + inference time. Configurations: batch=1 patch=64³ (RTX 2070S), batch=2 patch=64³ (RTX 4090). Record in configs/model_profiles/mambavesselnet.yaml.
NOTE [STOP Protocol compliant — ERROR-5 + SUGG-07 fix]: NEVER use MINIVESS_ALLOW_HOST=1 for VRAM measurement. ALL execution via Docker + Prefect.
task.commands:
# Local RTX 2070 Super (8 GB) — Docker + Prefect: docker compose --env-file .env \ -f deployment/docker-compose.flows.yml run --rm --shm-size 8g \ -e EXPERIMENT=debug_mambavesselnet \ -e BATCH_SIZE=1 \ train
# RunPod RTX 4090 — SkyPilot managed job (auto spot-recovery): sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/smoke_test_gcp.yaml \ -e MODEL_FAMILY=mambavesselnet \ -e EXPERIMENT=smoke_mambavesselnet \ --name minivess-mamba-vram
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] vram.inference_gb populated (measured) - [ ] vram.training_gb populated (measured) - [ ] vram.measured=true, measured_gpu, measured_date filled - [ ] If OOM on RTX 2070 Super → cloud_only=true + min_vram_gb documented

task.title: End-to-end smoke test: 10 epochs on RunPod RTX 4090
task.description: Run 10-epoch smoke test on MiniVess subset (4 training volumes). Verify: training loop completes, val_loss finite, MLflow artifacts written. Test both AMP policies: Run 1: mixed_precision_val=false (default) → confirm no NaN Run 2: mixed_precision_val=true → check for NaN If Run 2 also clean → update debug/smoke YAML and model profile: amp_validation=true. Record result in knowledge-graph/experiments/mambavesselnet_smoke.yaml. Update cover letter §3 table: MambaVesselNet row.
task.commands: sky jobs launch deployment/skypilot/smoke_test_gcp.yaml \ -e MODEL_FAMILY=mambavesselnet \ -e EXPERIMENT=smoke_mambavesselnet_cloud \ -e LOSS=cbdice_cldice \ --name minivess-mamba-smoke
task.acceptance-criteria: - [ ] Run STATUS=FINISHED - [ ] val_loss finite (not NaN, not inf) - [ ] MLflow run_id recorded - [ ] No CUDA OOM - [ ] AMP policy decision documented in model profile - [ ] knowledge-graph/experiments/mambavesselnet_smoke.yaml created - [ ] Cover letter §3 verification table updated

plan.dependency-graph:
T00 (Docker) → T03 GPU tests, T04 GPU tests, T05, T06, T09, T10
T01 (enum + availability) → T02, T03, T04, T05, T06 → T07 (parallel with T02-T05, needs enum only) → T08 (parallel with T02-T05, needs enum only — BUT commit after T06)
T02 → T03 → T04 → T05 → T06 T06 → T08 (file must exist for KG link check) T07 → T09 T06 + T07 + T00 → T09 → T10
Parallelizable: T07 + T08 can start after T01 while T02-T05 proceed.

issue.title: infra: Docker base image CUDA compilation strategy for mamba-ssm
feat: add [mamba-ssm] optional dependency group + ModelFamily enum
gpu: MambaVesselNet VRAM measurement + smoke test on RTX 4090

ban.reason: Vendored fork only — not in PyPI mamba-ssm. Use BidirectionalMambaLayer.
SOTA race framing — platform paper. See metalearning 2026-03-15.
ModelAdapter._build_config() and base methods use self.config (no underscore).
CLAUDE.md Rule #19 — escape hatch for pytest ONLY, never in scripts.

ban.pattern: norm_name omitted from UnetrBasicBlock / UnetrUpBlock calls
ban.reason: MONAI blocks have no default for norm_name — TypeError at construction.

ban.pattern: LayerNorm in MambaBlock before calling BidirMamba
ban.reason: Double-LN bug. LN lives INSIDE BidirectionalMambaLayer only.
NEVER guess. Measure and write to YAML profile.

review-history.round: Reviewer 1 (Architecture): 5 ERRORS, 7 WARNINGS, 5 SUGGESTIONS Reviewer 2 (TDD+Integration): 4 ERRORS, 10 WARNINGS, 8 SUGGESTIONS All ERRORs incorporated. All WARNINGs incorporated. Key SUGGESTIONs incorporated. Plan v2 ready for implementation via self-learning-iterative-coder skill.
